runs.name: allergen_indexer_v2
runs.notes: v2 fix confirmed: generic container type rule correctly applied. Dict[str, AllergenHierarchy] → declared type is Dict → NO edge. v1 drew 1 edge (incorrect). v2 draws 0 edges (correct).

runs.name: ingredient_sync_manager_v2
runs.notes: v2 fixes confirmed: (1) no self-messages — ISM→ISM arrows removed; (2) _get_local_sync_state() correctly excluded as intra-file method; (3) _get_connection() calls compressed to one per block. Diagram matches GT structure exactly with correct alt-block placement of count calls. Note: _get_master_ingredient_count() and _get_seasonality_count() are actually ISM's own intra-file methods — the skill correctly labels their internal DB interaction via _get_connection(), semantically matching GT's labeling. 3 v2 run attempts before clean output achieved.

runs.name: preference_compiler
runs.notes: 0-edge diagram. Both classes (AnonymousQueryRequest dataclass + PreferenceCompiler) have only primitive/container fields. Skill correctly draws 0 edges. PreferenceCompiler.compile_for_query() RETURNS AnonymousQueryRequest but this is a return type, not a field declaration. Generic container rule not triggered (List[int] fields, no local class type params).

runs.name: seasonal_calculator
runs.notes: 0-edge diagram. Hemisphere enum present but never used as a field type in SeasonalCalculator. SeasonalCalculator fields are primitives only (db_path: str, server_url: str, reference_data_max_age: int). Tests enum-in-same-file scenario — correct result: no edge.

runs.name: master_ingredients_loader
runs.notes: Skill shows intra-file call chain correctly but misses cross-file DB terminal nodes entirely. db_util.connect(), db_util.commit(), db_util.execute()/fetchall(), db_util.close() are calls on the db_factory database object (cross-file) and must appear as leaf nodes. Skill agent prompt only said 'method-level granularity' without explicitly requiring cross-file calls as terminal nodes. New SKILL.md rule needed.

runs.name: cuisine_hierarchy_loader
runs.notes: Same root cause as master_ingredients_loader: skill shows __init__→_load_data initialization chain (pre-entry-point) instead of the load_hierarchy() pipeline DB calls. db.execute(DELETE), db.commit(), db.fetch_one(INSERT) are cross-file terminal nodes representing calls on the db object from db_factory.py. Shows __init__/_load_data as extra intra-file initialization context not in GT.

runs.name: sync
runs.notes: All GT file actors and GT calls present (node_recall=1.0, edge_recall=1.0). FAIL due to hallucinations: (1) added FastAPI Client and PostgreSQL DB as actors — external systems, not Python files; (2) showed pg_database_utility's INTERNAL calls to PostgreSQL (PgUtil→Database arrows) — should only show sync.py's outgoing calls; (3) one ISM→ISM self-message 'build versions dict'. Two new SKILL.md rules needed.

new_gaps_identified.description: Skill agent for flowchart TB omitted cross-file method calls on imported objects. When entry point calls methods on objects from imported modules (db_util.connect(), db_util.execute(), db.commit(), db.fetch_one()), these MUST be shown as terminal leaf nodes in the flowchart. Current prompt only says 'method-level granularity' without specifying cross-file terminal node inclusion.
new_gaps_identified.fix: Add SKILL.md rule: For flowchart diagrams, identify ALL method calls on objects from imported modules (db.*, db_util.*, self.<injected>.* etc.) in the source code. Include these as terminal leaf nodes labeled with <object>.<method>() even if not captured in the graph JSON.

new_gaps_identified.description: Skill agent added external system actors (FastAPI Client, PostgreSQL DB) that are not Python source files. Actor rule states 'each actor maps to a distinct FILE' but skill interpreted this loosely to include HTTP clients and database servers.
new_gaps_identified.fix: Add SKILL.md rule: Actors in sequenceDiagram MUST be Python .py source files only. HTTP clients, database servers (PostgreSQL, SQLite), external services, and framework infrastructure are NOT actors and must not appear as participants.

new_gaps_identified.description: Skill agent traced into the internal implementation of called libraries (showed pg_database_utility's internal calls to PostgreSQL). Only the entry point file's outgoing calls should be shown.
new_gaps_identified.fix: Add SKILL.md rule: Show only the entry point file's outgoing calls to other files. Do NOT trace into what those called files do internally. If sync.py calls pg_database_utility.execute(), show sync→pgutil: execute() only. Do not show pgutil→database arrows.
